text.plain: First impression of a new video game?
Author Roald Dahl, during World War II
Reached the top of one's game
Grain that once fed the Roman army
Fictional subjects of 13 movies between 2000 and 2020
Medgar ___, one inspiration for the 1964 protest anthem "Mississippi Goddam"
Device such as a qamutiik, an Inuk means of Arctic transportation
Emits a stream of hot air
Neighborhood once home to N.Y.C.'s so-called "Gasoline Alley"
The world's biggest one contains seven keyboards
Shelters some look to when duty calls?
The good life, in Spanish vernacular
One might frequently be buttered up
Feature of Alfalfa's hair in "The Little Rascals"

relatedContent.text: Read and comment on the Wordplay blog

hints.clue: First impression of a new video game?
hints.hint: Initial click to begin a game.
Starts up or reveals something new.

hints.clue: Author Roald Dahl, during World War II

hints.hint: Search for something on your computer.
Famous author with a last name that rhymes with "both."

hints.clue: Reached the top of one's game
Grain that once fed the Roman army
hints.hint: Ancient grain that's making a trendy comeback in salads
Going out with someone who has more money
Region known for its diverse cultures and history in southeastern Europe.
